name: budget-controller
description: Token and API cost tracking adapted from Paperclip budget system. Track spend per agent, enforce limits, prevent runaway costs.

capabilities.per_agent_budget: Track token usage and API costs per agent per cycle
capabilities.spend_limits: Hard limits per agent (e.g., blockchain-wizard max 10K tokens/cycle)
capabilities.cost_alerts: Alert when agent approaches 80% of budget
capabilities.provider_cost_awareness: Route to cheapest available provider when quality is equivalent

rules: Groq: 12K TPM limit — track and respect
SambaNova: 24K context limit — only backup role
Free tier agents get lower budgets than sovereign operations
